tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated HbA1c (6.4%), indicating prediabetes or possible diabetes, and a mildly elevated hemoglobin. Total CO2 is slightly low, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. All other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and blood counts, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for glycemic status and further evaluation if symptoms or risk factors are present.
